title: Choose a set
body: Switch between exercise sets here — the bundled rudiments, anything you've imported, and sets you build yourself. It also shows how far you've gotten in each.

title: Find an exercise
body: Filter the current set by exercise name or number. Tap any card below to jump straight into it in Practice.

title: Create or import
body: New set opens the editor with a blank set to build from scratch. Import loads a set from a JSON file. Schema reference explains the file format.

title: Edit & manage sets
body: Expand this to manage every set. Duplicate a bundled set to make an editable copy, or edit / export / delete your own. The editor lets you add sections and exercises and build patterns on a click-to-edit sticking grid.
